column1: 冬の間に、春の準備をしよう。
column2: ふゆのまに、はるのじゅんびをしよう。
column3: Let's prepare for spring during winter.

column1: 寝ている間に電話があった。
column2: ねているあいだにでんわがあった。
column3: There was a phone call while I was sleeping.
column6: event occurs during the duration of another ongoing state
column8: 間に = at some point during; 間は = throughout the duration
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:の間に complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored

column1: 私が出かけている間に、子供が熱を出した。
column2: わたしがでかけているあいだに、こどもがねつをだした。
column3: While I was out, the child developed a fever.
column5: V-ている + 間に + unexpected event
column6: an event happened during someone's absence
column8: 間に = something happens at a point within the time span
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:の間に complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: 夏休みの間に日本語を勉強した。
column2: なつやすみのあいだににほんごをべんきょうした。
column3: I studied Japanese during the summer holiday.
column6: action is completed within the named time period
column8: の間に with nouns: activity done within a named time span
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:の間に complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: 若い間に旅行をしておくべきだ。
column2: わかいあいだにりょこうをしておくべきだ。
column3: You should travel while you are young.
column6: take advantage of a condition while it lasts
column8: 間に with states: do X before the condition changes
column10: module:03-n3 jlpt:n3 point:の間に complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored

column1: 雨が止んでいる間に買い物に行こう。
column2: あめがやんでいるあいだにかいものにいこう。
column3: Let's go shopping while the rain has stopped.
column5: V-ている + 間に + intentional action
column6: act while a temporary condition holds
column7: go now while rain is stopped
column8: 間に often implies you should act quickly before the window closes
